description_long: This butcher shop features a rustic, open-air wooden structure with a sloped, shingled roof supported by red timber beams. The shop is set on a circular grassy base and includes a wooden cart, barrels, and crates, suggesting a traditional market setting. Various meat products, including hanging cuts and displayed fish, are visible under the awning and along the side, with some meats suspended from hooks. The shop has no visible walls, allowing for easy access and visibility of the interior workspace, which contains a table and additional storage. Decorative elements include a chalkboard sign and clay pots, enhancing the market atmosphere. The overall design evokes a historical or rural architectural style, with an emphasis on practicality and open display.
description: A rustic, open-air butcher shop with a wooden shingled roof, hanging meats, and market accessories on a grassy base. The structure is open on all sides, showcasing displayed meats and traditional market elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wooden cart, barrels, chalkboard sign, and the open workspace under the roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sloped roof, a row of hanging meats, and the cart positioned to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the shop with more hanging meats, clay pots, and additional storage under the awning.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the workspace, barrels, and a partial view of the cart and hanging meats.
attribute_shop_signage: A small chalkboard sign is visible near the front left of the shop, featuring a dark background with light-colored writing or symbols. The details of the text or symbols are not clearly legible, but the sign is positioned to attract customers approaching from the front.
attribute_displayed_meat_products: Visible meat products include several pinkish cuts of meat hanging from hooks along the side and under the awning, as well as fish displayed in a row. There are approximately five to six hanging meats and several fish, all arranged for easy viewing by customers.
attribute_hanging_meat_hooks: There are approximately six hanging meat hooks visible, located under the awning and along the side of the shop. Some hooks are holding meat products, while others appear empty.
